raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Please clarify the scope of 'check this': (A) primarily writing polish and grammar, (B) logical consistency and evidence-claim alignment, or (C) comprehensive review including all aspects?","rationale":{"R1.2":"Logical consistency is a central responsibility in checking the argument chain of a research draft.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central to verifying if reported results support the conclusions in the artifact.","R1.6":"Writing polish is a central expected task when checking a draft for grammar, flow, and conciseness.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central in checking a climate projection draft to ensure limitations like regional exclusions are properly highlighted.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to reviewing strong conclusions about model skill and adaptation confidence.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to confirming the evaluation stays within the defined regions and metrics.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is central given the artifact's implications for adaptation planning in vulnerable regions.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is central to checking the origins of the model panel and data anomalies."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Please clarify the scope of 'check this': (A) primarily writing polish and grammar, (B) logical consistency and evidence-claim alignment, or (C) comprehensive review including all aspects?

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is a central responsibility in checking the argument chain of a research draft.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is central to verifying if reported results support the conclusions in the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is a central expected task when checking a draft for grammar, flow, and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central in checking a climate projection draft to ensure limitations like regional exclusions are properly highlighted.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to reviewing strong conclusions about model skill and adaptation confidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to confirming the evaluation stays within the defined regions and metrics.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central given the artifact's implications for adaptation planning in vulnerable regions.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is central to checking the origins of the model panel and data anomalies.
